title: Fusions Grappling Hook
description: A mod that adds a vanilla friendly fun grappling hook to the game
body:
# Fusions Grappling Hook This is a mod designed to add in a realistic yet fun to use grappling hook into Minecraft # Use Just jump off an edge and right click and you will go swinging!
while swinging the rope is also able to wrap around blocks!
![enter image description here](https://i.imgur.com/MjhoQ9A.png) # Crafting Recipe ![enter image description here](https://i.imgur.com/X4rWKjj.png)
Along with this you can also add dye like you would with leather armor and make the rope different colors!

![enter image description here](https://i.imgur.com/ImKlT3W.png) ![enter image description here](https://i.imgur.com/3MvhNls.png) ![enter image description here](https://i.imgur.com/s9JERWR.png)
